title: Hermes Agent Tutorial: How to Setup & Use Open Source AI Agent for Beginners
summary: Hermes Agent is an open-source AI agent framework available on OpenRouter with nearly 200K GitHub stars. It enables users to deploy AI agents locally on Mac or Windows with persistent memory, Telegram integration, cron job scheduling, and the ability to autonomously develop new skills without manual updates.
writeup: The tutorial walks through setup and use of Hermes Agent, an open-source AI agent framework available on OpenRouter, aimed at beginners. It covers local deployment on Mac or Windows and the agent's core features: persistent memory, Telegram integration, cron job scheduling, and the ability to autonomously develop new skills without manual updates. The framing connects these to broader concepts including agentic workflows, autonomous task execution, local inference, and multi-model usage.
